{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Nakothi's Intent
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Damaging [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] releases [[Nakothi's Intent]], which results in a horrible death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|If you do? “Nakothi’s Intent will be released, and you will die a horrible death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
